title: heliomeris multiflora var. brevifolia
intro: Heliomeris multiflora var. brevifolia, also known as Rocky Mountain greenthread, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting off infections, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Heliomeris multiflora var. brevifolia can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or tea to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
